g.text: “ I always try to be happy.
and I can’t always get good
best. I want to go to college
Marcus always try to be happy. Studying at
school is hard and he can’t always get good
grades, but he’s doing his best. His home has
in future and make my mother easier. So he
wants to go to college with a football scholar
ship, as well as he wants to grow matually.
